name: AFTER FLY
headline: AFTER FLY run club in Indore
description: AFTER FLY is an Indore run-and-rave organizer discovered through a public Luma event page. This unclaimed profile summarizes verified public facts for owner review and stays out of search until cadence, contact, and claim details are confirmed.
sourceSummary: A public Luma event page confirms AFTER FLY hosted AFTERFLY TAKEOFF RUN & RAVE in Indore on 2025-03-16. The page describes a movement-and-music community and the embedded event data lists Instagram handle afterfly.in.

facts.label: Format
facts.value: Run club plus post-run music social

eventEvidence.title: AFTERFLY TAKEOFF RUN & RAVE
eventEvidence.summary: The public Luma page lists a Sunday social run from Traffic Park near Daly College followed by a post-run techno social at Tropico Cafe.
facts: Run segment described as 2.2 km and optional for walkers
Page copy states INR 499 per person with payment link sent by Instagram DM after registering
Luma registration is closed on the public page

fitNotes: Repeatable run-club programming is a strong Catch organizer category because guests already share a live activity.
Indore gives the first test outside the largest metros, which helps validate city coverage and source sparsity.
Run-and-rave programming is a useful adjacency test because it blends low-pressure activity, curated crowd energy, and a post-event social setting.
missingEvidence: Owner or host contact outside platform relay
Whether the public Instagram handle is the preferred owner contact

sources.detail: The event page's structured data confirms the Indore location and 2025-03-16 timing; embedded page data lists instagram_handle afterfly.in.

name: Bhag Club
headline: Bhag Club running community in Delhi
description: Bhag Club appears to be both a running community and an activewear brand. Its official website describes weekly runs, training programs, and performance activewear; this Delhi-targeted Catch profile remains unclaimed and noindexed until a stable Delhi-specific source is verified.
sourceSummary: The official Bhag site confirms the brand/community positioning. A public Luma event page confirms a BHAG RUNS calendar and Bhag Club host profile with a Gurgaon event, but not a Delhi-specific event in this pass.

facts.label: City evidence
facts.value: Delhi is user-supplied; Gurgaon event evidence found

facts.label: Indexing
facts.value: Noindex until Delhi evidence is verified

eventEvidence.title: Bhag GGN
eventEvidence.summary: The public Luma page lists a Bhag Club-hosted Gurgaon run from Espressos AnyDay with a 3KM distance and free general admission.
facts: Hosted by Bhag Club under the BHAG RUNS calendar
Event location is Gurugram, not Delhi
Registration questions include Instagram, age, gender, emergency contact, attendance intent, and consent
Embedded host data lists website thebhag.in and social handle bhagclub

fitNotes: BHAG shows why the entity model needs to cover brands and organizers, not only clubs.
The Luma event includes registration questions, consent, emergency contact, and attendance intent, which maps to Catch's host onboarding and event policy surfaces.
The official website combines commerce and community; organizer profiles need to model external websites and source-backed event evidence separately from Catch events.
missingEvidence: Preferred business contact for the organizer
Whether Bhag Club should be represented as one national brand or separate city chapters

name: Sunday Table Club
headline: Sunday Table Club in New York
description: Small hosted dinners and mixers with prompts that keep the room moving.
sourceSummary: Sunday Table Club is a first-party Catch demo club with app-created events, verified event reviews, host identity, and event-success metrics.

catchEvents.title: Hosted long-table dinner
catchEvents.summary: A hosted long-table dinner with arrivals, prompts, and a warm close.

catchEvents.title: Hosted singles mixer
catchEvents.summary: A hosted mixer with live rotations, compatibility questions, and host-facing reveal controls.

catchEvents.title: Hosted singles mixer
catchEvents.summary: A completed hosted mixer with enough feedback and matches for the sales report.

reviews.comment: The host kept the dinner moving without making it feel forced. Easy arrivals, good prompts, and useful follow-up after.
The rotations made it simple to meet more people than I would have on my own, and the post-event catch window felt private.
Good crowd and clear structure. I liked that the host could adjust the live flow when the group changed.

fitNotes: App-created clubs should lead with host identity, upcoming events, ratings, and member activity rather than a source ledger.
Verified review aggregates matter more here than scrape confidence because the club and events already exist inside Catch.
The page should help members decide whether to follow, book, or review, while unclaimed scraped pages should focus on owner claim.

sources.label: Catch host-demo scenario
sources.detail: First-party synthetic club used for host workflow, roster, review, payment, and Event Success QA.
